Name: UMovieSceneNewEventTrack
Description: Implements a movie scene track that triggers discrete events during playback.

Variables.Name: bFireEventsWhenForwards
Variables.Description: If events should be fired when passed playing the sequence forwards.

Variables.Name: bFireEventsWhenBackwards
Variables.Description: If events should be fired when passed playing the sequence backwards.

Variables.Name: EventPosition
Variables.Description: Defines where in the evaluation to trigger events
